hero_subtitle: SFTY links blockchain analytics risk data with compliance case workflows to preserve evidence, automate review routing, and maintain audit-ready records for digital asset operations.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to integrate varied blockchain analytics results into unified case management workflows. This disconnect leads to slow risk reviews, fragmented evidence, and challenges in maintaining an audit-ready compliance record.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates diverse blockchain analytics outputs, consolidating risk signals, transaction data and alerts into unified cases with linked evidence to streamline review workflows and preserve audit-ready compliance records.
workflow_title: From blockchain analytics to case management
workflow_description: SFTY structures blockchain analytics outputs through risk rules, alert routing, case creation, evidence collection and decision logging within one compliance workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond blockchain analytics. One case layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects multiple blockchain analytics outputs into structured cases, workflows and evidence to streamline review processes without replacing existing tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs connecting blockchain analytics outputs to case workflows with audit-ready evidence and bank due diligence in governed enterprise deployments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: Ask SFTY how blockchain analytics integrate with case management
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how blockchain risk alerts create structured compliance cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how case workflows preserve blockchain analytics audit evidence
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe provider orchestration for multi-source blockchain risk data
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY support blockchain analytics cases?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects blockchain analytics outputs to compliance workflows, turning risk signals into structured cases, decisions, evidence packages and reports for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How are blockchain risk signals linked to cases?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk signals and links them to cases, enabling detailed review, risk triage and compliance decision workflows within one platform.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence for cases?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and raw provider results to support audit-ready evidence and enable defensible compliance reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect multiple blockchain analytics providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates multiple blockchain analytics and KYT providers to normalize results and orchestrate connected case workflows across vendors.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing blockchain analytics tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace analytics tools but connects their outputs into a centralized, operational compliance layer for case management and reporting.
final_title: Connect blockchain analytics outputs to case workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY links blockchain risk signals with case management, evidence preservation and structured compliance decisions for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
